_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 11:55 UTC tick (15 news_flash events — 4 iran_ceasefire + 11 us_iran_military Touska-seizure duplicates, all SKIP). TIMELINE RE-CORRECTED via WebSearch Al Jazeera/ABC/PRIO/Wikipedia/BusinessToday Apr 21: ceasefire expires 0000 GMT Wed Apr 22 = T-~12h (not Thu Apr 23 02:00 UTC as prior ticks assumed — that was misread of Trump 'Wed eve Washington' which is Tue eve DC ≈ 0000 GMT Wed UTC). Iran PULLED OUT Islamabad Round 2 per Al Jazeera/BusinessToday, citing US seizure of Touska + Hormuz blockade as truce breaches. Al Jazeera 4/19 'Tehran vows retaliation'. Current prices 11:55 UTC: USDJPY 159.161 (+0.024 flat, 0.29 below 159.45 fade), GOLD 4791.74 (+1.7p bounce <4800 fade), OIL 87.187 (+7.4c drift, 2.81 below 90 escalation), AUDUSD 0.71627 (-0.4p flat, 92p >0.707 breakdown), EURUSD 1.17655/USDCAD 1.36549/GBPUSD 1.35192/USDCHF 0.77952 all <3p. Market still priced-in-deal-optimism despite T-12h. 3 MODIFY (all 3 alerts timeline correction to T-12h), 8 queries KEEP, broker $1000/0 pos matches, no trades (binary event, no edge).
